As someone who never thought they would need a personal injury attorney, I was hesitant and overwhelmed when I reached out to Cloward Trial Lawyers for help. But when I met Ben, everything changed. The weight on my shoulders was lifted by his genuine kindness and empathetic nature. I didn't just find a lawyer, I found an ally, a confidant, and a friend.

Ben's knowledge and professionalism were evident from the start, but what surprised me most was his authentic caring about my well-being. He didn't just listen to my story, he understood it. Throughout the process, he proactively addressed my concerns and anticipated my needs, minimizing my stress and anxiety.

My life has been forever changed, and because of Ben and his team, the future for myself and my family is much brighter. To say I'm grateful would be an understatement. Ben Cloward is a lawyer who truly cares, and I would recommend him to anyone in need of an ally and advocate during a difficult time.

But when I called and spoke to Ben, I knew immediately that he was the attorney that I would be hiring because he was patient, and explained everything in great detail. Not only that but he was just a breathe of fresh air after speaking to the other law firms. He seriously went above and beyond and just gave me a sense of relief. I am BEYOND satisfied with the services of this law office and would definitely recommend them to anyone who is needed legal assistance. Earlier this year I was traveling with my family when we were hit at a high speed by a drunk driver. The impact was so severe that my car was thrown completely off the road and rolled repeatedly before coming to a stop. The side of my car was caved in at the point of impact. I could barely move. My wife and daughter were both injured and hysterical. I was seriously injured and had to have my head stapled. Thankfully we didn’t lose our lives although from the high force of the crash we very easily could have. When looking for a lawyer to handle our car accident case we wanted someone who first, cared, second, had the ability to expertly handle our case, and third, someone we felt we could trust. The internet is full of lawyers who handle car accidents not to mention the ones depicted on television. With so many choices we are thrilled we contacted Oronoz & Ericsson. Jim and Tom have been an absolute pleasure to work with. Their staff is helpful, friendly and responsive. I second all the other positive reviews which have been written about them and their firm. They have patiently answered all our questions, quickly returned all our calls and have made significant progress with our case. I am very happy that I went with Oronoz & Ericsson and highly recommend them to anyone in Las Vegas who is injured in a car accident and needs the best in legal representation.
It has been great to work with these lawyers! Thank you!

We recently realized the real meaning of trust when handing over a portion of our savings to someone we just met to keep a family member out of trouble.
I called Oronoz & Ericsson on Labor Day and we happen to reach a Law Assistant that was warm, patient, and swift. She is genuine, without a doubt. The office was closed for the day but she still invited us to come and meet with Law Attorney James “Jim” Oronoz, the founder of Oronoz & Ericsson. We was grateful for them to meet with us on a holiday and on such short notice. Arriving at the office we was impressed how well the grounds was kept and the discreet location. Inside the office it was immaculate, professional, comfortable and private. After completing a couple of forms we met with “Jim” in his office. He made us feel comfortable and confident that he will be the best Attorney to represent us. His personality is direct, intelligent, patient, friendly, and honest. He answered all of our questions and even helped us with a legal matter outside the initial reason of meeting with him. The man is brilliant with ample legal knowledge. We fully trust him with our sensitive matter and refer anyone that is having legal issues to Jim at Oronoz & Ericsson.
When I Called Oronoz & Ericsson I Didn’t know what to expect, I only knew what type of services we needed and, “they absolutely hit the mark”.
We arrived to the office worried and confused, but we walked out confident and strong because we put our trust in Jim and his amazing team at Oronoz & Ericsson. Thank You Jim and Thank you staff.

reviews.text: My family and I have trusted Erik as our injury lawyer for several years, even before he has his own firm. reviews.text:
I want to take a moment to share my experience with Erik, my injury attorney. I just recently had my case resolved, and that’s why I felt it was the right time to write this review.

From day one, Erik was on top of everything. He handled all my appointments, followed up with doctors, and guided me step by step through the entire process. After every doctor’s visit, he always checked in to make sure I was okay and kept everything moving forward. He kept me updated regularly, and anytime there were changes or paperwork to handle, he let me know right away. His assistant, Rocio, is also amazing—super knowledgeable and approachable any time I had questions.

One thing that made a big difference for me is that Erik is fluent in Spanish. There were a few times when I didn’t fully understand some legal terms, and being able to speak to him in Spanish helped me feel more confident and clear about everything going on. Having his knowledge and experience, plus being able to communicate directly and clearly, made a huge impact.

My case ended in a very positive way—a great agreement, to say the least—and it’s all thanks to Erik and Rocio’s hard work and dedication.

I originally found Erik through close friends who had worked with him and had only great things to say. I trusted them, and now, after my own experience, I’m glad I did.

I also followed him to his new office, and I’m happy I made that decision. The new location is in a nicer area, it’s comfortable, and the overall experience reflects Erik’s style—professional, efficient, and client-focused. Even the amenities in the new office are worth mentioning—he really thought about his clients’ comfort, and it shows.

If you’re looking for an injury attorney, stop right here. Don’t waste your time looking around. Time is extremely valuable in these types of cases, and Erik is the one you want. He personally handles your case from beginning to end—no bouncing around between assistants or departments. He won’t leave you sitting in a lobby for 30 minutes, and he won’t take days or weeks to return your emails or calls. He’s responsive, respectful of your time, and genuinely cares.

On top of that, Erik also handles traffic tickets and citations. I’ve referred friends to him for those kinds of cases, and they’ve had very positive outcomes as well.

On a final note, I want to sincerely thank Erik and Rocio. Without them, I wouldn’t have had such a great outcome. Their dedication, professionalism, and care made all the difference.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Hector. It was a pleasure to be your attorney in this matter. We love happy clients !

reviews.text: Getting into a car accident with my family was one of the most harrowing experiences of my life. After the initial shock, we had to figure out how to navigate the recovery process. Calling Paul Powell was the best decision that I made in the days that followed; his team helped to connect us to the care that we needed but would not have known how to find on our own. Everyone on his staff exuded professionalism and courtesy as they walked us through the process of getting us back on our feet. And I have to say that he was more than true to his word with his promise of "more lawyer, less fee". I would wholeheartedly recommend calling Paul to anyone who has been injured in a car accident. We can't express enough gratitude to Paul and his team for everything they have done for our family.
I’d recommend finding another lawyer. I was underwhelmed by their communication and handling of medical treatment. Heidi was very pleasant.

The Paul Powell really did helped with everything and for me personally and other family members I know. We got the best outcome.

reviews.text:
My wife was T boned by an SUV five years ago this month. We reached out to the Paul Powell law firm for help & advise as we had never been in any accident or even spoke to an attorney before in our lives. The insurance company was just wanting to pay for our vehicle and be done with us. My wife was having severe neck and back pain that was only getting worse. The insurance company was making lite of her injuries despite the fact that the force of the impact caved in the entire passenger side of the vehicle and when the vehicle finally hit the median sideways it broke the rear driver side wheel off of the hub & broke the independent suspension and axle off of the vehicle. The first few people that we spoke with at the firm told us that Paul & his son Jared will be handling the case personally from here on out. Then Covid hit which totally bogged down the case & I personally believe that all the low ball offers were Covid driven due to the fact that a ton of people were out of work, again just my opinion. Jared was just amazing and legally talented, not only did he give us his personal cell phone number but genuinely cared about my wife & our family. The insurance company didn’t budge so off to court we went and that’s where Paul came in and just killed it and we won!!! They had all these “professionals” testifying on their behalf and it didn’t matter one bit, Paul crushed them all. Paul promised us a certain amount of money and he delivered it and some!! I really don’t waste time on reviews unless I am completely pushed back on my heals, good or bad. In this day and age, a man really only has his word. Paul made a promise and kept it, Paul is a man of his word, thank you Paul. A very special thank you to Jared for all of your advice, wisdom, help and your friendship, you are a real class act!! Lastly a big thank you to the entire Paul Powell team, you really made us feel like family.

Mr & Mrs G
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your incredible experience. We're thrilled to hear that Paul, Jared, and the entire team could support you and your wife during such a challenging time. Your recognition of their dedication and hard work means a lot to us. We're committed to treating our clients like family, and we're so glad you felt that support throughout the process. Thank you for entrusting us with your case and for your kind words.

reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. We understand that the legal
process can be lengthy and frustrating at times, and we appreciate your patience. While every case is unique, some can take several months to resolve depending on the details and circumstances involved.

If you have any questions or would like a detailed breakdown of your case and fees, we encourage you to contact our office directly at 702-728-5500. We’d be happy to go over everything with you.

Thank you again for bringing this to our attention.

—The Paul Powell Law Firm

—The Paul Powell Law Firm

reviews.text: Paul Powell says he will never take more money than you. I ended up with the same money he did after he left me with about $1000.00 in medical bills after my settlement. He also made a mistake which cost me $10,000.00 in medical reimbursement from my auto insurance policy.

They weren't very professional I lost a lot that night when a young kid went across traffic to. Get to his apartment never stopping to look and hit me n totaled out my gt mustang . bruised my wrist and reinjured my neck ,I had a 2 bulging desk very painful went n seen a chiropractor for about 2 weeks was suppose to get the shots in neck to help with pain ..it never happened,I lost a 10,000 car n still in pain n they tried telling me my medical bills were 10,00 to 11,000 for what .and wouldn't let me have my paperwork on my bills from Dr..they walked away with lot more then I did n I am the one who lost my car n still in pain .how do you advertise that u get the most for people when Injured that's a joke false advertisment ..
reviews.ownerResponse:
We’re sorry to hear that you’re unhappy with your experience, Misty. At The Paul Powell Law Firm, we are committed to fighting for our clients and ensuring they receive the best possible outcome. We understand how frustrating and difficult accident-related losses can be.
While we can’t discuss case specifics publicly, we’d be happy to go over any concerns you have about your case and provide clarification regarding your medical bills and settlement. Please reach out to our office at 702-728-5500 so we can address your concerns directly.
Our goal is always to maximize recovery for our clients, and we appreciate the opportunity to discuss this further with you.

reviews.text: They handled my husband's case from an accident where he was rear-ended, just fine. That is not the reason for the bad review. The settlement was paid by the at fault party's insurance. Back in June of 2024 we sent a letter to this law firm saying we weren't pursuing an addition claim against our own insurance. The claim was never closed by the firm and we are facing an additional $1300 surcharge added to our auto insurance premium because the claim remains open. Our insurer said we cannot close the claim; it has to be done by our attorney. We have called 6 times this month and they have done nothing to close the claim. We called again today and they said give us a few more days "to look into it;" not actually contact our insurance company. Our auto premium is due very soon and being on a fixed income, we cannot afford the extra $1300. The surcharge would be cancelled if this office would just do its job and contact the insurance company. It's been over 6 months since we made our wishes known in writing and we're still trying to get them to take care of what should be a quick and simple matter. The insurance company will not let my husband request the claim be closed. He has repeatedly told this office that the claim can only be closed by them directly contacting the insurance company and requesting it. He just heard back from this office saying to send our insurance the letter we sent in June, asking them to handle this. He has given them the open claim number. We cannot understand why they cannot just simply call, email or mail them asking them to close the claim as we requested? I will revise this to a more favorable review, if they take immediate action to close the open claim against our insurer. This shouldn’t be this difficult!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dear Lisa,

Thank you for reaching out and sharing your concerns.



We understand how important this is to you. Please know that we take your concerns seriously and have escalated this to ensure the necessary steps are taken as quickly as possible.



A member of our team will be reaching out to you shortly to provide an update and confirm the next steps. If you have any further details or documentation that might assist us in expediting this process, please feel free to contact us directly at 702-728-5500.



We appreciate your patience and the chance to address this matter. Thank you again for bringing it to our attention.



Best regards,
The Paul Powell Law Firm

Hi Melanie, thank you so much for your 5-star review! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

We truly appreciate your kind words and are honored to have been able to help you. At The Paul Powell Law Firm, we’re committed to fighting for our clients and ensuring they get the justice they deserve. Your trust means everything to us!

If you ever need anything in the future, don’t hesitate to reach out. Thanks again for choosing us! 💙⚖️ #ThankYou #WeFightForYou #PaulPowellLaw

reviews.text:
I want to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude to Frank Macias for the support, guidance, and genuine care he showed me during one of the most difficult times of my life. From the very first conversation, Frank treated my situation with compassion, professionalism, and respect. He didn’t just listen—he heard me. He took the time to understand everything I was going through, and he went above and beyond to help point me in the right direction.

Even though my case ultimately aligned better with Kaplan Law, Frank never hesitated to help me find the legal support that best fit my needs. That kind of integrity is rare. He truly showed that his priority was my well-being and finding the right path for my case, not just signing a client.

His patience, kindness, and willingness to explain every detail made me feel supported and cared for at a time when I felt overwhelmed. Frank made sure I didn’t feel alone in the process, and I am genuinely thankful for his time, professionalism, and heart.

I highly recommend Frank Macias and LJU Law Firm to anyone looking for an attorney who treats you like a person, not a number—someone who will stand by you, guide you honestly, and care about your outcome.

Thank you, Frank. Your support truly made a difference. 🙏🏽💛
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to write this. We are so grateful for Frank and we are really happy to hear he helped you find a firm that could help you.

When an injury disrupted my Philadelphia, PA's client's life while on vacation in Las Vegas, NV, I needed a legal team to refer her to  that would stand united with us in pursuit of justice. The personal injury attorneys at LJU forged a powerful alliance with my referred client and me.

James D. Urrutia, Esq. placed my client's needs at the forefront of our mission, uniting his expertise with our cause. Jim worked efficiently and expeditiously to ensure that my referred client received the fair treatment she deserved, despite being an out-of-town litigant, and he and his team obtained "top dollar" in compensation for her.

I have the upmost trust and confidence in the abilities of the LJU Law Firm. I would urge not only claimants, but attorneys themselves to refer their own clients to the LJU Law firm for excellent legal representation, guided by the law firm's unwavering dedication to law, justice, and unity. A long overdue review for the LJU team!
Where do I start… THIS IS HANDS DOWN THE BEST FIRM IN LAS VEGAS!

This talented team is ready to go, aggressive and willing to fight with you every step of the way. Their ability to problem solve, listen, communicate, and attention to detail is everything you want when seeking a law firm. LJU helped me fight for the maximum settlement and nothing less. This team follows their values and I promise you.. they will persevere and WIN!

James and Andrew, together you guys are a powerhouse and duo to be reckoned with. Your talents as attorneys is absolutely exceptional! James your ability to navigate through difficult cases and take different creative approaches is brilliant! Andrew your strategy and analytical skills is to be highlighted! Thank you for putting in so much effort into fighting with me.. also having so much patience to listen to my concerns.

Danielle, is such a hard-worker. She communicated with me on every detail through the process and made sure I’m completely aware of what to expect. She works fast and is very efficient; always punctual and her creative writing skills is outstanding!

Andrea and Sonya, you both do so much and work so hard at the firm! Your talents doesn’t go unnoticed! Thank you for working on my case and continued dedication my father’s case! Andrea, you always make sure to cover any grounds that may have been missed or overlooked! Working in operations and trials is no easy task, but you make it effortless! I always look forward to working with you ladies!

LJU has exceeded every one of my expectations and they created a positive experience for me! This team has worked with me for quite sometimes now and I’m very happy I hired LJU; they will always be my first recommendation!

Thank you again James, Andrew, Danielle, Andrea, and Sonya… you guys have grown into my second family over the year and I wouldn't have it any other way! I love watching your firm grow and all the success you guys are having!

If you’re still hesitating on picking a personal injury attorney, pick LJU!

Where do I begin!! LJU was referred to us by my gfs father home care taker nurse after he had suffered a burn injury from a Walgreens product but wasn’t able to live long enough to see the lawsuit being handled unfortunately he passed away & On the morning of Oct. 1st 2023 of last year my girlfriend & I got into a car accident hit by a drunk driver from behind going 150 mph we were lucky that we survived. My girlfriend was taken to UMC & I was taken & rushed to 3 different hospitals the entire process was truly painful & that very same day was my gf father funeral we were both banged up pretty bad & my gf & I at very bad ptsd after the crash. She contacted LJU & they took on our cases & handled it with care every step of the way + Andrew & James had so much patience even when I was still upset after the crash & confused they fought hard to get our cases handled & what most law firms in the country WOULDNT do they looked out for us & today my case finally came to its close. Thank you so much Andrew, James, Danielle, Andrea & can’t forget about the dog Duncan!!

LJU IS BY FAR THE BEST LAW-FIRM IN LAS VEGAS & IS THE FUTURE ALL THOSE OTHER FIRMS HAVE NOTHING ON THESE GUYS! THEY WORK FAST & ARE TOTALLY TRANSPARENT EVERY STEP OF THE WAY & THEIR FOR THE PEOPLE. IF YOUR LOOKING FOR ATTORNEYS THIS IS THE RUGHT PLACE YOU WONT REGRET IT!!!!!

MARK MY WORDS THIS COMPANY WILL BEAT ALL ORHER FIRMS THEIR HONEST, TRANSPARENT, FAST & NOT MONEY HUNGRY THY WILL DO THEIR BEST TO HELP EVERY ONCE. LJU IS MY ONLY LAWFIRM FROM NOW ON I WILL CALL IN ANY SITUATION!!!

-Shaheem
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much! It was great getting to know you. Thank you for giving us a chance!

Thank you for being there to pick up the pieces from a horrible situation. We cannot recommend a better law firm!

reviews.text: They handle my case pretty fast and I got paid out really well and fast also. Thank you very much for your services. Greatly appreciate you.

I highly recommend LJU Law Firm. Everyone on the team is professional and knowledgeable yet easy to talk to. They took a lot of the stress out of dealing with a personal injury claim from a car accident. There was great communication throughout, they were quick to respond with any questions I had and I am very happy with the outcome! Thank you James, Drew, Andrea and Danielle!
I gave 5 stars or more if i can. Excellent teamwork. Thank you for all the help. Above and beyond assistance. I highly recommend this LJU law firm. Andrea and Atty. James you’re the best.
The team is courteous patient experienced and full of knowledge. They explain things to me in a way that I can understand. I finally feel like I have a personal family law team.
reviews.authorName: Mel In Da Maze AKA Melinda NailFanatic

reviews.text: Great experience! I feel like my lawyer is a good friend and I will for sure go to him if I need help in the future! I am very happy with the results!
Highly recommend actually the only firm I would recommend.  Everyone on the team treats you like family.  The communication was amazing.

Amazing. Simply amazing. Was ticketed for an "at fault" accident a few months back. James was able to prove my case in court and get the ticket dismissed. The settlement at the end of the case was just icing on the cake.

You shouldn’t go through a traumatic experience alone, dealing with for-profit insurance companies that minimize the value of your loss.  After my car accident, Mr. James and Ms. Andrea took the burden off my shoulders and was the best decison I could have ever made.  My experience was a master class of how a professional, empathetic, and effective law firm should be.  Thank you for your invaluable service to my family.
